title: Guns n Zombies
description: mod pack that's about guns and zombie survival
body:
🔫 Guns and Zombies

Survive the zombie apocalypse with an arsenal of firearms and the help of brave villagers in this action-packed modpack. Designed for Minecraft 1.20.1, Guns and Zombies offers intense combat, strategic gameplay, and a world teeming with undead threats.
Modrinth
+4
Modrinth
+4
Modrinth
+4

⚔️ Features

Extensive Weaponry: Equip yourself with a wide range of guns to fend off zombie hordes.

Villager Allies: Recruit villagers to fight alongside you—just be cautious not to harm them.
Modrinth

Vanilla-Style Terrain: Explore a world with altered terrain that maintains the classic Minecraft aesthetic.

Hardcore Challenge: For seasoned players, attempt survival in Hardcore mode for an added layer of difficulty.
